patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 1 (negative-edge GOLD) remains the single most validated, non-negotiable cap in the archive -- CONFIRM every time it fires (CHW@TOR today) without override consideration.

D-grade picks with SP-xERA-against + PQI-against (dual or triple opposing signals) split close to 50/50 directionally in the archive -- the correct response is always SKIP, never an OVERRIDE fade to the opposing team (PIT@CLE, TEX@ATL, MIN@CHC, SD@KC, DET@LAA, SF@SEA today).

HARD CAP 7 (bullpen disadvantage) has a documented false-positive risk on marginal xwOBA gaps below the 0.04 'meaningful' threshold -- the 7/10 KC@BAL break (+0.018 gap, won) is the precedent. Two of today's CAP 7 fires (TB@BOS +0.0117, LAD@NYY +0.0176) are both below that line; LAD@NYY additionally clears the pre-cap score>=5 four-dimension rescue bar and was elevated.
Pre-cap score>=5 with F-signal + SP-xERA + PQI + Stage-agreement all affirming simultaneously is a validated CAP-10 rescue condition (6/12 ARI@CIN, 7/10 CLE@MIA) -- applied to LAD@NYY today.

Extreme positive edges in the 18-25pp+ range remain a recurring calibrator-hallucination signature (7/9, 7/13 precedents) rather than real value -- WSH@OAK (+22.43pp) and TEX@ATL (+18.81pp) both treated as noise today, not upside.

TB @ BOS.reasoning: No market match (odds_status=no_match) means edge/fair_prob can't be computed -- un-bettable regardless of the pre-cap A- stack (SP+PQI+Stage all affirm). HARD CAP 7 also fired on a marginal +0.0117 bullpen gap, below the 0.04 'meaningful' threshold flagged when CAP 7 broke its 0-for-7 streak on a similarly small gap (7/10 KC@BAL, +0.018, won). No odds means no stake regardless. CONFIRM SKIP.

LAD @ NYY.reasoning: Pre-cap score=5 (A) with all four dimensions affirming simultaneously -- F-signal, SP xERA (+1.16, Cole over Sasaki), PQI confirms (+11.2), Stage 1/2 agree -- matches the validated CAP-10 rescue exception from 6/12 ARI@CIN and 7/10 CLE@MIA. HARD CAP 7's +0.0176 bullpen gap sits well under the 0.04 meaningful threshold the archive flagged as a false-positive risk (7/10 KC@BAL, +0.018, broke the 0-for-7 CAP7 streak). Rescuing to GOLD.

PIT @ CLE.reasoning: D-grade with SP xERA against CLE (-2), PQI against (-1), and an extreme 0.2437 Stage 1/2 disagreement -- the 7/8 archive explicitly flags delta>0.20 combined with opposing SP xERA as making the Stage 2 direction unreliable. Per the 7/9 lesson, D-grade dual-opposing picks split roughly 50/50 directionally, so no OVERRIDE to PIT is warranted -- direction is genuine noise, not a fade signal. CONFIRM SKIP.

TEX @ ATL.reasoning: SP xERA against TEX (-2), PQI against (-1), and fair_prob (0.32) far below the pick's implied probability, with the +18.81pp edge sitting in the archive's calibration-caution 18-25pp zone (real losses tracked there, 7/13 same pattern). Dual-opposing D-grade signal -- per repeated lessons, SKIP without fading to ATL is correct; direction is ambiguous, not reversible.

CHW @ TOR.reasoning: Negative edge (-6.64pp) on a GOLD-tier pick triggered HARD CAP 1 -- the single most validated, non-negotiable cap in the archive (correctly called ATL@STL 7/10, Sale/ATL twice). No override consideration; F1_xera_gap is starred (thin sample) despite F3 corroboration. CONFIRM SKIP.

MIA @ MIL.reasoning: PLATINUM tier carries a documented ~43% historical hit rate (Heuristic #4) and confidence_downgrade=True is active. Pre-cap score is only 1 (B-) -- PQI runs against the pick (-6.0) and the sole affirming signals are F3 and Stage-agreement, well short of the four-dimension rescue bar used for LAD@NYY. CONFIRM SKIP, extra PLATINUM scrutiny applied.

MIN @ CHC.reasoning: Clean D-grade dual-opposing stack: SP xERA against CHC (-2), PQI against (-1). Consistent with the archive's repeated pattern that these split close to 50/50 directionally -- SKIP is correct, no fade to MIN warranted.

BAL @ HOU.reasoning: Cleanest pick on the slate -- no hard caps fired. Positive edge (+12.66pp), F-signal and PQI (+7.9) both confirm HOU, Stage 1/2 agree (delta=0.09, under the 0.12 trigger), and hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap is essentially neutral (-0.0012), so CAP 7's bullpen-disadvantage pattern doesn't apply. Straightforward CONFIRM at GOLD.

SD @ KC.reasoning: D-grade with SP xERA against KC (-2), PQI against (-1), and a negative team_quality modifier. Triple-opposing-signal configuration -- archive shows these correctly predict losses more often than not (e.g. 7/11 NYY@WSH, CHC@CIN). CONFIRM SKIP.

CIN @ COL.reasoning: Thin pre-cap stack (score=1, B-): only F-signal and Stage-agreement affirm while PQI runs against (+18.4 favoring COL) and confidence_downgrade=True is active. Edge (+3.1pp) sits below the 4pp floor. Falls well short of the four-dimension rescue bar. CONFIRM SKIP.

DET @ LAA.reasoning: D-grade with SP xERA against LAA (-2) and a negative team_quality modifier; only Stage-agreement affirms. Thin, signal-opposed pick -- CONFIRM SKIP.

WSH @ OAK.reasoning: Edge of +22.43pp sits in the archive's repeatedly-validated calibrator-hallucination zone -- HARD CAP 6 (>25pp) and the calibration_caution_18-25pp soft cap both target exactly this pattern (7/9 PHI@CIN CAP-6 hallucination, +28.36pp, model was wrong). model_prob 0.7304 is also flagged outside the normal [0.48,0.72] band. PQI runs against WSH. Treat the extreme edge as noise, not value. CONFIRM SKIP.

SF @ SEA.reasoning: D-grade dual-opposing: SP xERA against SF (-2), PQI against (-1), and fair_prob (0.388) below the 0.42 floor. Consistent pattern -- SKIP correct, no override to SEA.

STL @ ARI.reasoning: Probable SP for STL not yet announced (PENDING_SP_DATA); the pipeline needs 100+ Statcast pitches once confirmed to score this game. A live statsapi lineup check was attempted but tool execution was unavailable this run -- no directional read possible. Will resolve on the next workflow pass once STL's starter is confirmed.
